disabled_touchpoints.description: List of touchpoint name strings for which offer screens are completely suppressed. When the requested touchpoint appears in this list, the mapper returns CAN_NOT_OPEN and no offer is shown.

disabled_subtouchpoints.description: List of sub-touchpoint name strings for which offer screens are completely suppressed. When the requested sub-touchpoint appears in this list, the mapper returns CAN_NOT_OPEN and no offer is shown.

touchpoints.description: Array of touchpoint detail objects, each defining offer configurations for one or more touchpoints. Looked up by matching the requested touchpoint against name or names. If no match is found, the entry with name "default" is used as a fallback. If no entry matches at all, the result status is FAILURE.

names.description: Alternative list of touchpoint name strings that this entry matches. Used as an alias mechanism: if the requested touchpoint appears in this list (via contains check), this entry is selected. Works alongside the name field — a match on either name or names qualifies.

name.description: Primary identifier of the touchpoint. Matched against the requested touchpoint string. If no match is found, the entry with name "default" is used as a fallback.

info.description: Array of offer parameter configurations for this touchpoint. Each entry represents a candidate offer with its own screens, session tracking, and launch logic rules. Entries are evaluated in order; the first entry with a passing launch_logic rule set is selected as the resolved offer to display.

thank_you_popup.description: Identifier for the thank-you popup to display after a successful offer interaction. Passed through to the resolved OfferScreenParam for use by the UI layer.

launch_logic.description: Array of launch logic rule sets. Each entry defines a combination of conditions (ranges, limits, flags). The entries are evaluated in order; the first entry whose conditions all pass causes the offer to be shown. If no entry passes, this offer configuration is skipped.

should_replace_with_ad.description: When true, the offer is only shown if an interstitial ad is currently available for the mapped touchpoint. The availability is checked via the interstitial ad service. Defaults to false when absent.

should_replace_with_reward_credit.description: When true, the offer is only shown if a rewarded ad with credits flow is currently available for the touchpoint. The availability is checked via the rewarded ad service with credits flow validation enabled. Defaults to false when absent.

install_day_min.description: Minimum number of days since app first use (inclusive) required to show the offer. Calculated from the stored first-use timestamp. A value of -1 (combined with install_day_max of -1) disables the range check.

editor_done_min.description: Minimum number of completed editor actions (inclusive) required to show the offer. Checked against the editor done counter stored in preferences. A value of -1 (combined with editor_done_max of -1) disables the range check.

app_session_end.description: Maximum app session count (exclusive) for showing the offer. The offer is shown when the app session count is in the range [app_session_start, app_session_end). A value of -1 means no upper bound; if both start and end are -1, the check is skipped entirely.

editor_done_max.description: Maximum number of completed editor actions (exclusive) for showing the offer. The offer is shown when the editor done count is in the range [editor_done_min, editor_done_max). A value of -1 means no upper bound.

session_limit_start.description: Minimum in-memory offer session count for this touchpoint (inclusive) required to show the offer. Tracked per touchpoint-screens composite key within a single app process lifetime. A value of -1 (combined with session_limit_end of -1) disables the range check.

had_subscription_package.description: List of subscription package ID strings. When non-empty, the offer is only shown if the user's purchase history contains at least one of these package IDs. When empty, this check is skipped.

user_had_subscription.description: Filter based on the user's subscription history. When true, the offer is only shown if the user has previously had a subscription. When false, the offer is only shown if the user has never had a subscription. When null/absent, this check is skipped.

should_replace_with_reward_interstitial.description: When true, the offer is only shown if an interstitial ad is currently available for the mapped touchpoint, with the minimum show interval check skipped. Defaults to false when absent.

key_session_start.description: Minimum key session count (inclusive) required to show the offer. Only evaluated when session_key is non-empty. Checked against the persistent key session counter stored in shared preferences. A value of -1 (combined with key_session_end of -1) disables the range check.

install_day_max.description: Maximum number of days since app first use (exclusive) for showing the offer. The offer is shown when the install day count is in the range [install_day_min, install_day_max). A value of -1 means no upper bound.

is_ai_credit.description: Filter based on whether the user is in an AI credits flow. When true, the offer is only shown if the user is currently in a credits flow. When false, the offer is only shown if the user is not in a credits flow. When null/absent, this check is skipped.

offer_screen_touchpoint.description: Offer screen touchpoint identifier at the launch logic level. Takes priority over offer_screen_touch_point when both are present. Passed through to the resolved OfferLaunchLogicParams for the UI.

repeat_key_session.description: Key session repeat interval. Only evaluated when session_key is non-empty. The offer is shown when (keySessionCount + 1) % (repeatKeySession + 1) == 0. A value of -1 disables the repeat check.

storage_min_percent.description: Minimum cached storage usage percentage (inclusive) required to show the offer. Checked against the user's cached storage usage percent from StorageUsageRepository. A value of -1 (combined with storage_max_percent of -1) disables the range check.

is_store_available.description: Filter based on Google Play Store availability. When true, the offer is only shown if Google Play is among the active payment types. When false, the offer is only shown if Google Play is not among the active payment types. Defaults to true when absent.

key_session_end.description: Maximum key session count (exclusive) for showing the offer. Only evaluated when session_key is non-empty. The offer is shown when the key session count is in the range [key_session_start, key_session_end). A value of -1 means no upper bound.

repeat_session.description: App session repeat interval. When set, the offer is only shown when the global app session count is evenly divisible by this value (appSessionCount % repeatSession == 0). A value of -1 disables the repeat check.

offer_screen_touch_point.description: Legacy offer screen touchpoint identifier at the launch logic level. Used as a fallback when offer_screen_touchpoint is not provided. Passed through to the resolved OfferLaunchLogicParams for the UI.

restricted_packages.description: List of package and offer ID pairs that restrict offer eligibility. When non-empty, all entries must pass the promotional offer eligibility check (the user must be eligible for every listed promotional offer). When empty or absent, this check is skipped.

package_id.description: Subscription package identifier used to check the user's eligibility for a promotional offer via SubscriptionInfoUseCase.isUserEligibleForPromotionalOffer().

offer_id.description: Promotional offer identifier used together with package_id to check the user's eligibility for a promotional offer via SubscriptionInfoUseCase.isUserEligibleForPromotionalOffer().

current_tier_types.description: List of subscription tier type strings the user must currently belong to. When non-empty, the user's active subscription tier type must match one of these values. The special value "free" matches users who are not subscribed. When empty, this check is skipped.

app_session_start.description: Minimum app session count (inclusive) required to show the offer. Checked against the global app session counter. A value of -1 (combined with app_session_end of -1) disables the range check. When app_session_end is -1 and this value is set, only the minimum is enforced.

daily_session_limit.description: Maximum number of times the offer can be shown per calendar day for this touchpoint. The daily counter resets after 24 hours. The offer is shown only when the current daily count is strictly less than this value. A value of -1 disables the daily limit check.

should_replace_with_reward.description: When true, the offer is only shown if a rewarded ad is currently available for the touchpoint. The availability is checked via the rewarded ad service. Defaults to false when absent.

skip_offer_during_cooldown.description: When true, the offer is skipped if the one-day pass cooldown period has not yet passed. The cooldown state is checked via OneDayPassConfigRepo.isCooldownPeriodPassed(). When false or null/absent, the cooldown check is not applied.

session_limit_end.description: Maximum in-memory offer session count for this touchpoint (exclusive). The offer is shown when the session count is in the range [session_limit_start, session_limit_end). A value of -1 means no upper bound.

storage_max_percent.description: Maximum cached storage usage percentage (exclusive) for showing the offer. The offer is shown when the storage usage percent is in the range [storage_min_percent, storage_max_percent). A value of -1 means no upper bound.

offer_variant.description: Identifier for the offer screen variant. Passed through to the resolved OfferScreenParam.offerVariant for the UI to select the appropriate visual presentation. Defaults to empty string when absent.

screens.description: List of screen identifier strings associated with this offer configuration. Used to build the composite session-tracking key by joining them with dots after the touchpoint name (e.g. "touchpoint.screen1.screen2"). Also passed through to the resolved offer params for the UI.

offer_screen_touchpoint.description: Touchpoint identifier for the offer screen. Takes priority over offer_screen_touch_point when both are present. Passed through to the resolved OfferScreenParam for the UI to determine which offer screen to display.

session_key.description: Persistent key used to track how many times this specific offer has been shown across app sessions. Stored in shared preferences. When non-empty, enables key_session_start/key_session_end range checks and repeat_key_session logic. When empty, those checks are skipped.

is_one_time_offer.description: When true, indicates this offer is a one-time purchase rather than a recurring subscription. Mapped to OneTimePurchaseDetails.isOfferOneTime in the resolved offer params. Defaults to false when absent.

offer_screen_touch_point.description: Legacy touchpoint identifier for the offer screen. Used as a fallback when offer_screen_touchpoint is not provided. Passed through to the resolved OfferScreenParam for the UI to determine which offer screen to display.
